name: Jack Chia Industries (Thailand) Public Company Limited
summary: Jack Chia Industries (Thailand) Public Company Limited, together with its subsidiary, manufactures and distributes pharmaceuticals and cosmetics in Thailand. It also offers medical equipment and other consumer products. It sells its products under the Tigerplast, Tensoplast, Kangaroo, Tabu, Thermaplast, Jason, Ronson, and Golden lion brands. The company also exports its products. Jack Chia Industries (Thailand) Public Company Limited was founded in 1966 and is headquartered in Bangkok, Thailand.
